title: Ores Highlighted for Sodium
description: Ores Highlighted compatible with Sodium! 兼容模组钠的「矿物高亮」！
body:
### Compatible with **Sodium**  
Please use the [**original resource pack**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ores-highlighted) if the Sodium mod isn't loaded.

### **Pack Overview**  
**Tired** of struggling to spot valuable ores in dark caves? The **Ores Highlighted** resource pack enhances **vanilla** ore models by making them emit a soft, natural **glow** in darkness—preserving the original art style while drastically improving exploration! Whether in deep underground caverns or pitch-black ravines, rare ores like **diamonds** and **ancient debris** will now stand out clearly, helping you become a master miner with ease.  

### **Key Features**  
✅ **Brightness Boost**: Adjusted ore textures to glow in unlit environments.  
✅ **Vanilla-Friendly**: Faithful to the original ore designs—only visibility is enhanced, no visual or texture changes.  
✅ **High Compatibility**: Works seamlessly with most mods and texture packs without affecting other blocks or game mechanics.  
✅ **Performance-Optimized**: Only modifies model data, adding no rendering overhead—runs smoothly even on low-end devices.  

### **Supported Ores**  
- Coal Ore  
- Iron Ore  
- Gold Ore  
- Diamond Ore  
- Redstone Ore  
- Emerald Ore  
- Lapis Ore  
- Nether Quartz Ore  
- Ancient Debris  
- And more!  

### **Perfect For**  
▪ Survival mode miners ▪ Speed-caving ▪ Decorative builds (glowing ore walls!) ▪ Streams/videos for better visuals  

**Install and play instantly—no setup needed!** Say goodbye to torch spam and let the ores light your way!  

### My Other Works
Playful & Joyful [**Chinese Characters**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chinese-characters) that leave you unable to stop!

---

### 兼容模组**钠**  
如果未加载钠模组，请使用[**原始资源包**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ores-highlighted)。

### **资源包简介**  
还在为昏暗的矿洞中难以寻找珍贵矿石而**烦恼**吗？「**矿物高亮**」资源包通过优化**原版**矿石的模型，让所有矿物在黑暗中自然散发出柔和的**光晕**，既保留了原版风格，又大幅提升了勘探体验！无论是深邃的地下洞穴还是漆黑的峡谷，**钻石、远古残骸**等稀有矿石都将清晰可见，助你轻松成为矿物猎手。  

### **核心特性**  
✅ **亮度提升**：调整矿石纹理，使其在无光照环境下自行发光。  
✅ **原版风格**：完全基于原版矿石纹理优化，不改变外观或材质，仅增强可见性。  
✅ **兼容性强**：与大多数模组、材质包共存，不影响其他方块或游戏机制。  
✅ **性能友好**：仅修改模型数据，不增加渲染负担，低配设备也能流畅运行。  

### **支持的矿石类型**  
- 煤炭矿  
- 铁矿石  
- 金矿石  
- 钻石矿  
- 红石矿  
- 绿宝石矿  
- 青金石矿  
- 下界石英矿  
- 远古残骸
- 等等……

### **适用场景**  
▪ 生存模式挖矿党必备 ▪ 洞穴探险速通 ▪ 建筑装饰（发光矿石墙！） ▪ 录制视频/直播时提升观感  

**下载即装即用**，无需额外设置！告别火把海，让矿物自己为你引路吧！  

### 我的其他作品
好玩有趣的[**「汉字工艺」**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chinese-characters)，让你欲罢不能！
